subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of Glory! May God confirm thee. Thy detailed letter was received and its contents accorded with reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء خدا تایید نماید ترا مکتوب مفصل شما رسید مضمون مقارن حقیقت بود
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @love and unity, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @non-participation in politics
